message: 🌱 Add security-compliance: FR: `loose` mode allowing Docker mediaTypes  mission (#695)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "security-compliance-724-fr-loose-mode-allowing-docker-mediatypes",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "security-compliance: FR: `loose` mode allowing Docker mediaTypes ",
+    "description": "FR: `loose` mode allowing Docker mediaTypes . Requested by 26+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current security-compliance deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your security-compliance version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n security-compliance -l app.kubernetes.io/name=security-compliance\nhelm list -n security-compliance 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working security-compliance installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review security-compliance configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant security-compliance configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n security-compliance -l app.kubernetes.io/name=security-compliance\nkubectl get configmap -n security-compliance -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=security-compliance\n```\nRight now only OCI standard mediaTypes are allowed and anything else gets rejected such as Docker V2 Manifest and ManifestList\n\nIt would help a lot to have a loose mode where Docker V2 images are allowed to be stored inside the registry."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for FR: `loose` mode allowing Docker mediaTypes ",
+        "description": "```bash \n{\"level\":\"info\",\"params\":{\"distSpecVersion\":\"1.0.1-dev\",\"GoVersion\":\"\",\"Commit\":\"\",\"BinaryType\":\"\",\"AccessControl\":null,\"Storage\":{\"Dedupe\":true,\"GC\":true,\"Commit\":false,\"GCDelay\":3600000000000,\"GCInterval\":0,\"RootDirectory\":\"/tmp/zot\",\"StorageDriver\":null,\"SubPaths\":null},\"HTTP\":{\"Address\":\"127.0.0.1\",\"Port\":\"0\",\"AllowOrigin\":\"\",\"TLS\":null,\"Auth\":{\"FailDelay\":0,\"HTPasswd\":{\"Path\":\"\"},\"LDAP\":null,\"Bearer\":null},\"RawAccessControl\":null,\"Realm\":\"\",\"Ratelimit\":null},\"Log\":{\"Level\":\"debug\",\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n security-compliance -l app.kubernetes.io/name=security-compliance\nkubectl get events -n security-compliance --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"FR: `loose` mode allowing Docker mediaTypes \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "```bash \n{\"level\":\"info\",\"params\":{\"distSpecVersion\":\"1.0.1-dev\",\"GoVersion\":\"\",\"Commit\":\"\",\"BinaryType\":\"\",\"AccessControl\":null,\"Storage\":{\"Dedupe\":true,\"GC\":true,\"Commit\":false,\"GCDelay\":3600000000000,\"GCInterval\":0,\"RootDirectory\":\"/tmp/zot\",\"StorageDriver\":null,\"SubPaths\":null},\"HTTP\":{\"Address\":\"127.0.0.1\",\"Port\":\"0\",\"AllowOrigin\":\"\",\"TLS\":null,\"Auth\":{\"FailDelay\":0,\"HTPasswd\":{\"Path\":\"\"},\"LD",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "security-compliance",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
